entity.label: Jetheth
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A peg, or a prince, one of the Edomitish kings of Mount Seir (Gen. 36:40).

nodes.label: Jetheth
nodes.description: A peg, or a prince, one of the Edomitish kings of Mount Seir (Gen. 36:40).

verses.text: And these are the names of the dukes that came of Esau, according to their families, after their places, by their names; duke Timnah, duke Alvah, duke Jetheth,
Hadad died also. And the dukes of Edom were; duke Timnah, duke Aliah, duke Jetheth,
